reference: AFTER AWHILE THE DUST DISPERSED AND THERE APPEARED UNDER IT THE ARMY OF BAGHDAD AND KHORASAN A CONQUERING HOST LIKE THE FULL TIDE SEA AND SHAHRAZAD PERCEIVED THE DAWN OF DAY AND CEASED TO SAY HER PERMITTED SAY
text: After a while, the dust dispersed, and there appeared under it the army of Baghdad and Korasan, a conquering host like the full-tide sea. And Shahrazad perceived the dawn of day, and ceased to say her permitted say.
